cloud_router_ip_address.description: IP address assigned to the cloud router for routing traffic

cloud_router_ipv6_address.description: IPv6 address assigned to the cloud router for routing traffic

creation_timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the attachment was created

customer_router_ip_address.description: IP address of the customer's router connected to the attachment

customer_router_ipv6_address.description: IPv6 address of the customer's router connected to the attachment

effective_labels.description: Labels applied to the resource after merging with parent labels

google_reference_id.description: Reference ID for the attachment used by Google systems

id.description: Unique identifier for the interconnect attachment resource

label_fingerprint.description: Fingerprint used to detect changes in the resource labels

pairing_key.description: Key used for pairing with partner interconnect attachments

partner_asn.description: ASN of the partner providing the interconnect attachment

private_interconnect_info.description: Details about the private interconnect configuration

self_link.description: URL for accessing the resource in Google Cloud APIs

state.description: Current operational state of the interconnect attachment

terraform_labels.description: Labels defined in the Terraform configuration for the resource
